{{CargoClone
|name=Rumbo
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=105
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} DEF +60
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Resolver: W-tads extracted +9
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Resolver: W-tads extracted +15
|}}
